title: Nuclear-Core Lib
description: A Nuclear Core Library for standardizing
body:
Nuclear-Core Library is a development-focused Minecraft library 📚 that provides standardized nuclear basics.


Instead of every mod re-inventing its own radiation ☢️ effects or uranium items , Nuclear-Core offers a shared foundation  that developers can easily build upon.



## 🔧 Features🔧:


● Uranium Ore Block 

● Deepslate Uranium Ore Block 

● Raw Uranium 

● Raw Uranium Block

● Radiation System

● Adds a Radiation effect

● Introduces a Radiation variable for entities 

  -This variable can be modified 🔄
  
  -It is not used directly by the library, but offers flexibility for other mods
  
  -More on GitHub




## 🎯 Purpose

The main goal is standardization 📏 – to make sure nuclear mechanics ⚛️ like radiation and uranium are consistent across different mods.


👉 This library is not meant for players directly but for mod developers 👨‍💻 who want to add nuclear-themed content without reinventing the basics.


💡 Suggestions for improvements are always welcome!💡
Drop your ideas and feedback in the comments.
